_comment: Committed baseline for the engine scrub Criterion bench. The CI bench-regression job reads this file and fails if any tracked bench's measured median is more than `regression_factor` times the stored baseline. Generated by the workflow_dispatch-only bench-baseline-regen CI job on the runner class named below; never measured on a developer machine. While `pending_first_ci_baseline` is true the regression script reports informational numbers and exits clean — bootstrap state until the first regen run lands.
